name: bluebex-teams
description: Task management system (Next.js + Express + Postgres + Prisma).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api "npm run dev -w @bluebex/web" "npm run dev -w @bluebex/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bluebex/db && npm run build -w @bluebex/web && npm run build -w @bluebex/api
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,api "npm run start -w @bluebex/web" "npm run start -w @bluebex/api"
